title: Ecclesiastical Vowels
description: Learn the five Latin vowels as pronounced in Ecclesiastical (Church) Latin. Master the key difference: 'ae' says 'ay', not 'eye'.

title: Consonant Rules
description: The six consonant rules that distinguish Ecclesiastical Latin from Classical: soft C, soft G, V as 'v', TI as 'tsee', GN as 'ny', and doubled consonants.

title: Stress & Accent
description: Learn the three rules of Latin word stress: the penultimate rule, the antepenultimate rule, and how to identify long vowels.

title: First & Second Declensions
description: Understand the basic noun endings you encounter in every prayer — nominative, genitive, dative, accusative, ablative. Recognize them in the Our Father and Hail Mary.

title: Verb Basics: Present & Imperative
description: Learn the verb forms you hear at Mass — 'ora' (pray), 'credo' (I believe), 'laudamus' (we praise). Understand conjugation patterns.

title: 50 Most Common Prayer Words
description: Master the 50 Latin words that appear most often across traditional prayers. Includes Deus, Dominus, sanctus, gloria, gratia, and more.

title: Master the Ave Maria
description: A guided course to fully understand and pronounce the Hail Mary in Latin. Word-by-word breakdown with grammar notes, pronunciation drills, and AI practice.

title: Master the Pater Noster
description: Deep dive into the Our Father. Learn every word's meaning, grammatical role, and perfect your pronunciation with AI-guided practice sessions.

title: Altar Server Responses
description: Learn every response an altar server gives during the Traditional Latin Mass. Perfect for those preparing to serve at the altar.

title: Congregation Responses
description: All the responses the faithful give during a Missa Cantata or dialogue Mass. 'Et cum spiritu tuo', 'Amen', 'Deo gratias', and more.

title: Reading Latin Psalms
description: Build fluency by reading selected Psalms in Latin. AI coaching helps with pronunciation and comprehension of the Vulgate text.

title: Reading the Vulgate
description: Practice reading passages from the Latin Vulgate Bible. Start with familiar Gospel passages and build confidence reading sacred Latin text.
